headline: Denver grandpa lost in tariff confusion after buying $67 hubcap online — $46.38 added from tariffs. What are his rights?
summary: A Denver man ordered a single hubcap and was stunned when FedEx hit him with $46.38 in tariff-related fees on delivery. He's far from alone.
